title: THRESHOLD (Code Blue) Climate Intelligence Platform
description: Built a real-time climate crisis intelligence platform that predicts ecological tipping points using oceanographic data and machine learning. Integrated 20+ APIs including NOAA, NASA, and Scripps data, and developed funding pipelines using Stripe and Solana.

title: Power Outage Severity Prediction
description: Analyzed U.S. power outage data to identify key risk factors and predict outage severity using statistical analysis, hypothesis testing, and data visualization. Explored relationships between climate regions, causes, and outage duration.

title: SoCalGuessr Image Classification
description: Developed a machine learning model using PyTorch to classify Southern California city images. Implemented CNN architectures and data augmentation to improve prediction accuracy.

title: Grocery Store Food Processing Analysis
description: Created data visualizations comparing food processing levels across major retailers using pandas and matplotlib. Identified non-obvious trends in food quality and processing levels.

title: Cache Performance Analysis (Row vs Column Traversal)
description: Conducted performance experiments analyzing memory access patterns and cache efficiency. Demonstrated performance cliffs between row-major and column-major traversal using Numba and timing analysis.

title: ASL Sign Language Classification Model
description: Built a computer vision model to classify American Sign Language letters using neural networks and image preprocessing techniques.

title: Unity Campus Map with GPS
description: Developed an interactive 3D campus map in Unity with built-in GPS functionality to track user position in real time.

title: McDonald's Ordering System Recreation
description: Recreated a digital ordering system inspired by McDonald's kiosks, focusing on UI/UX design and interactive user flows.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Designed and developed a personal portfolio website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with dynamic project rendering and API integration.

title: Instructional Materials for Statistics Course (COGS 14B)
description: Created educational materials including problem sets, review guides, and explanations to support undergraduate statistics students.

title: Computer Refurbishing and IT Support
description: Diagnosed and repaired computers, installed operating systems, and provided technical support while managing hardware upgrades and system performance.

title: Kumon Student Progress Tracking System
description: Tracked student learning progress and implemented individualized education plans to improve performance across a range of age groups.
